title: Mastering Real-World Engineer Applications with mattpocock Skills
author: Suman Giri
snippets:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

# Generate a 10 million row dataset
data = np.random.randint(1, 100, 10000000)
df = pd.DataFrame(data, columns=['Values'])

# Perform data manipulation and analysis
df['Values_squared'] = df['Values'] ** 2
df['Values_cubed'] = df['Values'] ** 3

# Visualize the data
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.hist(df['Values'], bins=50)
plt.show()
